analysis:
Based on your $7M portfolio analysis:

**Best CSP:** PLTR $125 strike, 2026-06-18, 41 DTE, $3.65/$3.75 bid/ask, 0.25 delta, 26.4% annualized return

**Best CC:** GOOGL $420 strike, 2026-06-18, 41 DTE, $8.50/$8.70 bid/ask, 0.32 delta, 19.3% annualized return (existing position)

**Best LEAPS:** None qualify - all candidates either extended >8% above MA50 (hard stop) or have IVP >50% (too expensive)

**Best PMCC:** None available

**Best Bull Call Spread:** None available

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across the board (PLTR 74%, MSFT 91%, NFLX 85%) creating strong CSP premiums, but making LEAPS purchases expensive - focus on premium selling strategies.

Note: MSFT CSP shows 15.5% annualized (below your 15% minimum) but PLTR offers excellent 26.4% with high-quality pullback setup.
